title: Inscribe Alternative: Faster Bank Statement Analysis for Lenders
meta: Looking for an Inscribe alternative for bank statement and fraud analysis? Compare features, speed, and fit for MCA brokers and small-business lenders.
content:
Why Lenders Look for an Inscribe Alternative

Inscribe is known for document fraud detection and automation aimed at larger fintech and lending operations. Teams searching for an alternative usually want something faster to adopt, priced for smaller volume, or more tightly focused on the bank statement underwriting workflow rather than broad document AI.

What to Look For in an Alternative

  • Speed to first result: Upload a PDF and get a usable read in seconds, with no integration project.
  • Core risk signals: Income verification, NSF and overdraft counts, MCA detection, negative days, and a risk score.
  • Fraud indicators: Tampering and manipulation checks, structuring, and circular-deposit detection.
  • Pricing that fits volume: Pay-as-you-go or modest monthly plans, not enterprise minimums.

Fraud Detection Still Matters

The reason teams use tools like Inscribe is doctored statements. Any alternative must hold the line on fraud — flagging altered totals, inconsistent fonts/metadata, and impossible math — while also delivering the cash-flow analysis lenders need to actually make a decision.

Where StatementScrub Fits

StatementScrub pairs document and fraud checks with full cash-flow analysis and lender matching, returning a complete read in under 30 seconds. It's built for MCA brokers and small-business lenders who want the risk signals without enterprise onboarding.

Bottom Line

The best alternative is the one that's fast to adopt, strong on fraud, and complete on cash flow. Run a few real statements through it and judge the output for yourself.
